release_notes:
v1.2.5830 Visual QA & Memory Upgrade:
- Global Custom Opacity: Added a new toggleable shape opacity slider (10% to 100%) to the QA window, allowing annotators to easily peek behind dense polygons and bounding boxes.
- Persistent Session Memory: Opacity preferences are now saved to the Main App's global memory. Your custom settings will seamlessly persist across every folder you open until the application is fully restarted.
- True Hollow Boxes: When the custom opacity toggle is OFF, shapes now correctly default to a 0% fill (completely hollow outline) for maximum raw image visibility.
- Canvas Stability Patch: Restored core crosshair rendering variables to prevent UI crashes during rapid workspace hot-swapping and Editor initialization.
